scenarios.title: Semiconductor re-entry (EXAMPLE)
scenarios.thesis: Memory supply bottleneck + sustained hyperscaler capex.
scenarios.falsification: Any major hyperscaler explicitly cuts capex guidance.
scenarios.verdict_criteria: PASS = HBM visibility into next year + capex flat/up; PARTIAL = mixed signals; FAIL = explicit capex cut.

blanks.entry_signal: break above prior high after PASS

scenarios.verification_note: capex guidance maintained across two hyperscalers

rules.text: Do not change any rule because of a single day's move.
Exit if the stop of -8% from average is breached on a closing basis.

trades.note: first tranche after PASS, on entry signal

events.title: SK Hynix earnings + Meta call (EXAMPLE)
events.result_note: capex guidance maintained across two hyperscalers
